titleStmt.title: SII 38.279: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 279. (A.R. No. 279 of 1912.) ŚIVANKŪḌAL, KANCHIPURAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall, central shrine, Śivakoḻunḍīśvara temple.

summary.p: In several fragments. A number of inscribed stones fixed into the wall are in disorder. It is evident that during the renovation of the temple in the later period, the stones containing inscriptions were set into the walls haphazardly.

It commences with the meykīrtti of the ruler pugaḻ-sūḻnda. It seems the local assembly of the village Śivankūḍal in Nīrvēḷūr-nāḍu sold a piece of land, freed from taxes, apparently to the temple in the village. It also refers to the assignment of 220 kuḻi of land as ērippaṭṭi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻcūḻn=ta pu
ṇari Akaḻcūḻn=tapuvi (ā) yuḷ ponnemiyaḷavu
tannemi naṭappa viḷakku cayamakaḷai
m paruvattu vikkiramattoḻilā
ṇarntu matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākara
pamuṉaik kon=taḷavaraicar tan=taḷamiri
kaḻittu toḷvalikāṭṭip porpa
kirttiyainiṟutti vaṭaticaiy vākaiycūṭit teṉṟicai temaru kama
lap pūmakaḷ puṇarntu ponniyāṭai Innilappāvaiy tanimaiyun=tiravantu
punitan tirumaṇimakaṭa muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭit tannaṭi yiraṇṭum taṭamuṭiyākat tonni
tu vāṟu pokkaliyāṟu vaṟuppac ceṅkol ti

toṟuñ ceyal Iru ni viḷa ṅkaṇumatu
ru tanimeruvil puviviḷaiyāṭa vār kaṭaṟṟivaran=taratu
cori kaḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa tennavan karun=talai pa
ṭai kiṭappa parumaṇiyāramu tiruppuyattalaṅkalum viramu
mevalar vaṇaṅka viṟṟirun=taruḷiya kovirājakecaripanmara
ḻa devaṟku yāṇṭu Añcāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻama
r nirveḷurnāṭṭu civa[ nkūṭalsabhai] yom nilavilai

ye vaṭakkil Aṟakuṭu nitta
ḻaiñcu pon maṉṟappeṟuvatākavum maṉṟupāṭu I
ṟuttum Eṅkaḷur munninṟu tanmam cevi
kkuṭukka kaṭavomānom Ivvūr mahāsabhaiyom
Itu Anṟenpār keṅkaiiṭai kumariiṭai cey
tār ceyta pāvattaip paṭuvān

ceri kaḷiṟu niṟppa
kāppuṟakkiṭaikkiya Innāḷ viṟkulappiṟai
neṉ kaivil koṭṭar vikkalarpakili kaṭan
vayap tanmānamum viṭṭa veṅka
mutukkuneḷippa Iḻinta natikaḷuñ cu
ttalamā kuṭai ticaittan nāḷan

ṇṭār koyiluḷḷāl sū
kuṭutta nilamāvatu putteri ki
ku tivākarappeṟuñceṟuvukku ki
meṟkum tenpāṟkellai
vār kaliyaṭakkip peṟuñ ceṟuvi
In nānkellaikkuḷ naṭuvupa

devatāna Idevarkkut tam
�ṭuppa Oruvanukku nicatam Arumoḻitevanāle kuṟuṇi nellukku nila
ttukku viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Emmur kamalanārāyaṇapputteri kiḻ Āṭavalāna
vaḻi ñirpāyum nilam Erippaṭṭiyum Itan teṟkil kiḷāṅkirayamaṭṭiyum viṟpataṟ
laikaṇ Ikkāluṭanaṭain=ta tiṇṭamāṇikuṇṭilukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai
kilkaḷ Ikkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kiḻakku nokkippona kaṇṇi kālukkut teṟka
ḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam patinaṟu cāṇkolāl Erippaṭikku kuḻi
kellai

ḻikkut teṟkum Iṉṉāṉkellaikkuḷ naṭu paṭṭa nilam Iṭai maṇ
ṭi taṭi Onṟināl kuḻi m Itan kiḻaippiḷḷaiyāṇṭi taṭi Onṟi nāṟ
kkuḻi 2 100 2 10tu Itan vaṭakkil Erukam pokitaṭi Onṟināṟkkuḻi 2 100 2 10tu I
tan melai kāraikkāltaṭi Onṟināṟkkuḻi 7 100 2 10tu Āka kuḻi patu
mikutikkuṟaivu Uḷḷaṭaṅka Iṟaiiḻicci viṟṟukkuṭutta paricāvatu Erikkā
ṭi An=tarāyam Eccoṟu Añceri

ṟaimaiyiṟcūṭi ttannaṭi pira n=taṭa muṭiyākat tonnila ven=tar cūṭa muḷḷai manu
vāṟu perukak kaliyāṟuvaṟuppac ceṅkol ticaitoṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai Iru
nila viḷākameṅkaṇun=taṉatu Irunila veṇṇilāttikaḻa Otanimeru viṟppuli vi
ḷaiyāṭa vārkaṭaṟṟivān=tarattu pūpālar tiṟai viṭun=ta kalañcori kaḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa vila
ṅkiya teṉṉavaṉ karun=talai parun=talait tiṭattaṉ poṉṉakāppuṟat tiṭaikkiṭappa Iṉṉāṉ
ppiṟkulappiṟaipola muṟpiṉ poṉṉuñ colletir koṭiṟallatu taṉ
kai villetir koṭā vikkala naṅkili kaṭantu maṇalūr naṭuve tuṅkapattirai Aḷavu
meṅkaṇumaṭattiṉuḷ Eri mutukuṉeḷi
mukkaṭalu vātta
ḷukantucn=tānamum paṉṉāḷiṭṭa palamum payaṅketir māṟiya cayam perun=tiyum paḻiyikantu kuṭu
tta pukaḻiṉañcelviyum maṭaṉan=tayariṭṭamu miḷātukuṭutta veṅkari ñiraikaḷum
Digital edition of SII 38.279 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
